title: Vell's Modern Warfare [IV/MTS]
description: IV/MTS Military content pack focusing on modern weapons by VellEagle.
body:
**This content pack is a beta version. Please note that it may still be insufficient in terms of functionality and modeling.**

![top](https://i.ibb.co/HpMMct8j/2025-09-26-05-19-29.jpg)

-Overview-

# [IV/MTS] Vell's Modern Warfare (VMW)

**Vell's Modern Warfare** is a military content pack for Immersive Vehicles (IV).

This is the first VellEagle IV/MTS content pack outside of **GT CRAFT**. Currently in **beta** and still in its infancy, we plan to update it regularly to add more vehicles and weapons, as well as evolve its functionality and quality.
- - -
Included Aircraft List
> - F-4 Phantom II
> - F-15 Eagle
> - F-16 Fighting Falcon
> - F-2 (Viper Zero)
> - Eurofighter Typhoon
> - MiG-25 Foxbat
> - MiG-29 Fulcrum


Included Tanks List
> - Challenger 1
> - Leopard 1A1
> - Leopard 2A5


Included Weapons List (5 types, Air-to-Air Missiles)
> - AIM-9X
> - AIM-7M
> - R-60
> - R-27
- - -
-How to Install-

1. First, install the version of Forge that you want to use, either 1.12.2/1.16.5/1.18.2/1.19.2/1.20.1.
2. After installing Forge, once you have started Minecraft in Forge, make sure that the Mods folder is generated in the .Minecraft folder.

3. Download the required mod, "Immersive Vehicles" "Official Content Pack", and place it in the Mods folder. Choose the version to download that corresponds to the version you are playing.
[https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles)/
[https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles-official-content-pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles-official-content-pack)
4. Download the Vell's Modern Warfare corresponding to the version you wish to use from this site and place it in your Mods folder.
5. If you start Minecraft and the item is reflected, you have succeeded.

- - -
Notes
This pack is in beta, so some features are incomplete or subject to change.
Future updates will include additional content and improvements.
- - -
-FAQ-

**There is only one type of shell for tanks, will another type of shell be added in the future?**
> Various types of shells will be added in the future.

**The speed of the fighters is too slow, can this be improved?**
> At this time, the speed of the fighter engines is set low for experimental purposes. In future updates, engines will be created for each aircraft and detailed settings and improvements will be made.

- - -
**-Credits-**

**Thanks to the author of the OCP pack (Mr. Mulle) and (Don_bruce), author of IV/MTS, on whom the effects and sounds in this content pack depend.**

- - -
**Use and introduction on Youtube, etc.**

**Basically, you don't need to get permission from me. However, if possible, please include a link to the download site in the summary. If this is not possible, it would be appreciated if you could indicate the mod name "Vell's Modern Warfare" in the title or summary.**
